item.name: Dusk Shark
item.description:
While known to scavenge the flesh of the drowned, this large grey shark will as surely feast upon the living.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: A ferocious shark that is said to haunt every sunken ship in the Sirensong Sea. Its grey body makes it appear like a spirit of the dead in the dark depths, on account of which it is feared and loathed by sailors.
